calendar.matters:
Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Nov-06-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley
Appearances:
Saul M. Ferster, Esq. for Plaintiff Jerry Benjamin, also present, was sworn & examined.
No appearance by Defendant.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiffs' Jerry Benjamin, Karen Benjamin, Ronald Greenberg and Lee Greenberg dba Page Street Associates, and against the defendant Kristie M. Fleming
Past Due Rents and Damages of $9,272.00
Attorney's fees by motion
Costs of $1,634.50
Interest of $1,939.10 For the total of $12,845.60.

Judgment signed in open court.

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-02-2003 Continued To Nov-04-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
